creator: knu@idaemons.org
text:
At Sun, 28 Jan 2001 07:35:04 +0900 (JST),
imura wrote:
> - Update www/linux-lesstif-ns to latest version(0.92.17).
> - Use bzip2 archive instead of gzip archive.
> - Do linux(8) before configure, because if linux mode
>   is not active, this port won't be configurable/buildable
>   and will show weird error messages (kind of these
>   messages will confuse some people).
> - Please remove "patch-aa", in addition to the following
>   patch.

Good work!  However, lesstif-0.92.17.tar.bz2 seems to have gone and I
couldn't fetch it.  Judging from the broken link lesstif-test.tar.bz2
-> lesstif-0.92.17.tar.bz2 left in the ftp directory, it might have
been a transient test version.

Would you investigate the case and submit a new update?

Thanks,
